## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran backend tests: `npm --prefix backend test`
- [ ] I updated related docs (if needed)
- [ ] I followed Vietnamese comment convention (`docs/comment-style.md`)
- [ ] No runtime artifacts are included (logs/cache/dumps)
- [ ] This change respects community legal scope (non-official project)

## Notes

Any additional context, screenshots, or API response samples.
